commit.message: submission: move archive, assets, writeup to satellite repo
docs(writeup): refine misleading master training table

submission: jas0xf_adversarial_neural_representation (0.27)

Token-based neural codec with master TokenRendererV62 + slave ShrinkSingleNeRV
+ HPAC autoregressive entropy model. 207 KB archive decodes back to a 60-second
1164x874 driving clip in ~22 min on a Tesla T4. Final score: 0.27.

Includes inflate.py + inflate.sh (decoder), compress.py + compress.sh + training/
(full training pipeline with off-the-shelf placeholder hyperparameters during
the active competition window), the validated archive.zip, the eval report, a
24-page writeup, and two demo GIFs in assets/.

Adds constriction + pyppmd to pyproject.toml (used by inflate.py for arithmetic
decoding of tokens.bin and PPMd decompression of hpac.pt.ppmd respectively).
ci: update leaderboard tables
